simon-notes.source_attribution: Originally prepared by Vignesh Siva. Transcribed, expanded & updated to 2026 regulations by Nixon Antony, 2/E, Maersk A/S.

simon-notes-p1.html.summary: Maritime security (UKMTO/MSCHOA), IS Code intact stability criteria, CII/CF, STCW Manila amendments, hours of rest, lifeboat testing, cyber security, GISIS, MARPOL Annex VI, IMO DCS, GHG strategy, watchkeeping, LSA Code.

simon-notes-p2.html.summary: Gyro/compass, LRIT vs AIS, MMSI, stability booklet, GT/NT formulas, DWT, guardrails, CII AER, Arctic HFO ban, ballast water management, CLC 1992, commercial law, ISMS/ISO, EU ETS.

simon-notes-p3.html.summary: COP 28/29, CBDR-RC, IS Code righting-arm criteria, NOSDCP, broaching, lifeboat engine specs, lithium-ion battery fire, FSI/PSC qualifications, FMEA/RPN, ISM apex manual tiers, MSA 2025/DGMA, STCW 2027, ISO 8217:2024, FAME biofuel, flags of convenience.

simon-notes-p4.html.summary: SAR 1979, GNSS jamming/spoofing, full PSC chain (action codes, detention types, suspension, appeal), SOLAS training manual Pack A/B, lifejacket specification, lifeboat davit P.92, hull steel grades, CE ISM+MLC duties, blockchain, IoT, IWIS predictive maintenance.

simon-notes-p5.html.summary: Bonjean curves, GZ & dynamic stability, smart sensors & IOPP, VDR, ARPA, flag state duties (UNCLOS Art.94), ME vs MC engine types, Port of Refuge, Polar Code, LSA Code & FSS Code.
simon-notes-p5.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending, same as p1-p4/p6-p8.

simon-notes-p6.html.summary: Formal Safety Assessment (FSA) 5-step process, competency vs proficiency, class vs statutory certificates, COP-29 & MARPOL amendments, Maritime Zones Act 1976, BDN retention rules, load line survey, SAFCON, parametric rolling, inclining experiment & free surface effect.
simon-notes-p6.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending.

simon-notes-p7.html.summary: CO2 fixed firefighting system (pressure testing, capacity, maintenance), TQM 8 principles, FAL Convention & 7 FAL forms, Maritime Single Window, maritime liens, UNCLOS zones, CSC Convention, container marking ISO 6346, VGM & 2026 container regs.
simon-notes-p7.html.known_issue: Broken 'Notes Index' topbar link — fix pending.

simon-notes-p8.html.summary: SUA Convention & 2005 Protocol, London Dumping Convention & 1996 Protocol, Basel Convention (toxic trade, Ban Amendment), HNS Convention 2010 Protocol, BWM Convention D-1/D-2, BWTS type approval (G8/BWMS Code), IMO vs USCG differences.

current-topics-p1.html.summary: MASS Code, EU/UK ETS & FuelEU Maritime, GFI/Net-Zero Framework, hydrogen propulsion (LR BeHydro TA), IACS UR E26/E27 cyber security, AI watchkeeping, SOLAS lifting appliances & PFOS-free firefighting foam, BWM D-2, NCSR 13 nav/comms (digital VHF, R-mode, EPIRB, S-100 ECDIS, NAVDAT), Strait of Hormuz security.

engineering-management-notes.source_attribution: Originally compiled by Uday Sankar S., Anglo-Eastern. Transcribed, expanded & updated by Nixon Antony, 2/E, Maersk A/S.

miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.title: IMO Structure & Conventions
miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.summary: IMO organisational structure, Committees & Sub-Committees, IMO instruments, convention lifecycle (adoption, ratification, tacit acceptance).
miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.gating_note: Applied full content-protection stack this session (gate script, noindex/nofollow/noarchive/nosnippet robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark). Original upload had robots='index, follow' and no gate — corrected. Footer text also corrected: original said 'This is a free public resource... Subscriber access unlocks Parts 3-31', implying Part 1/2 were meant as an ungated teaser. Now gated per Nixon's explicit instruction — flag if a free-teaser policy for Part 1 was actually intended, since that would need the opposite treatment.

miw-notes-mgmt-p2.html.title: Amendment Mechanisms, GESAMP & SDGs, MEPC-83, MARPOL Annex I
topics: MARPOL Annex I — Certification, ORB, LOT, Slop Tanks
miw-notes-mgmt-p2.html.summary: IMO legislative amendment lifecycle (SOLAS Article VIII / MARPOL Article 16 tacit acceptance), GESAMP institutional architecture and UN SDG mapping to shipboard operations, MEPC-83 GHG pricing / Net-Zero Framework / CII Z-factor trajectory (framed as draft pending formal adoption), and MARPOL Annex I statutory certification, Oil Record Book, Load on Top, and slop tank capacity rules.
miw-notes-mgmt-p2.html.gating_note: Built ungated, presented for Nixon's review, then gated this session with the standard content-protection stack (gate script, noindex/nofollow/noarchive/nosnippet robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark) matching Part 1. Corrections applied per Perplexity validation pass before build: (1) MARPOL Annex I Special Areas list corrected to add 'Southern South African waters' and rename 'Oman area' to 'Oman area of the Arabian Sea'; (2) fabricated '34 ppm' tanker cargo-tank-washing discharge limit removed and replaced with correct Regulation 34 rate/quantity criteria (≤30 L/NM, ≤1/30,000 of cargo), with 15 ppm correctly scoped to machinery-bilge discharge only; (3) MEPC-83 GHG pricing tiers and CII Z-factors reframed throughout as draft/illustrative pending formal adoption (MEPC ES.2 adjourned Oct 2025 without agreement; adoption rescheduled Nov 2026); (4) SDG-mapping language changed from 'mandates/codifies' to 'supports/aligns with' since SDGs are UN policy goals, not binding IMO regulation; (5) raw '[cite: 5]' citation markers stripped from the slop-tank capacity table. notes index (index.html) note-card added for Part 2 with full topic-keyword data-kw string for the local search feature.

miw-notes-mgmt-p11.html.page_range: 251-269 of 768 (source batch supplied to 275; pp.270-275 no distinct new topic, rolled into Part 12)
miw-notes-mgmt-p11.html.title: Load Line Convention, HSSC Statutory Survey Framework, Tonnage & Hong Kong Convention
topics: T49 · Tonnage Metrics & Hong Kong Convention
miw-notes-mgmt-p11.html.summary: International Load Line Convention 1966 (freeboard, reserve buoyancy, Type A/B ships), statutory survey engineering under the Harmonised System of Survey & Certification (HSSC), and ship tonnage metrics culminating in the Hong Kong Convention IHM/SRF lifecycle. Topic numbering continues the global T-sequence from Part 10 (T46).
miw-notes-mgmt-p11.html.gating_note: Received as an ungated review copy (gate script stripped) with full content-protection stack otherwise already in place (robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark). Added the standard auth gate script (miw_auth=1 cookie check → /SQ/pay.html) this session to match Parts 1-10. Corrections already applied in the review copy per verify-note blocks: FWA formula corrected from the erroneous 'Δ/(40×TPC)' to the correct 'W/(4×TPC) mm'; HSSC Survey Guidelines resolution updated from superseded A.1156(32) to current A.1207(34), 2025; Hong Kong Convention entry-into-force date corrected to 26 June 2025. Cross-linked to Part 10 (backward) and Part 12 (forward) in the sidebar Navigate block.

miw-notes-mgmt-p12.html.title: Ship Recycling & Hong Kong Convention, BWM Convention, Salvage/LOF/SCOPIC, Port of Refuge & GA, III Code & MSAS
miw-notes-mgmt-p12.html.summary: Ship Recycling Facility requirements under the Hong Kong Convention, Ballast Water Management Convention D-1/D-2 standards, marine salvage law (Lloyd's Open Form & SCOPIC), Port of Refuge decision-making & General Average, and the IMO Instruments Implementation (III) Code with the Member State Audit Scheme (MSAS/IMSAS). Topic numbering shown as local Part 12 badges (P12-T1–P12-T5) pending global renumbering, per standing platform rule, until all 31 parts are confirmed live.
miw-notes-mgmt-p12.html.gating_note: Received as an ungated review copy (gate script stripped) with full content-protection stack otherwise already in place (robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark). Added the standard auth gate script (miw_auth=1 cookie check → /SQ/pay.html) this session to match Parts 1-11. Sidebar Navigate link corrected from the placeholder 'Part 10 (Part 11 pending)' to a proper '← Part 11' link now that Part 11 is live. Footer topic-numbering note updated to reflect Part 11's confirmation while retaining local P12-T badges per the standing global-renumbering-deferred rule.

miw-notes-mgmt-p3.html.title: MARPOL Annexes I & II — Oil/Chemical Pollution Prevention
miw-notes-mgmt-p3.html.summary: MARPOL Annex I: Double-Hull Structural Geometry & Tank Segregation; MARPOL Annex I: Oil-Water Separator Evolutionary Design & Operational Discharge Regimes; MARPOL Annex I Survey Framework, IOPP Certification & Port State Preparedness; MARPOL Annex II Control of NLS, Chemical Ship Classification (IBC/BCH) & Operational Discharge Standards; Advanced Chemical Regulatory Management: P&A Manuals, Tripartite Agreements, HNS & Modern Amendments

miw-notes-mgmt-p4.html.title: HNS, MARPOL Annexes IV–VI, NOx Technical Code & SOLAS FSS/FTP
miw-notes-mgmt-p4.html.summary: Hazardous & Noxious Substances (HNS) & Harmful Packaged Cargoes; Sewage & Garbage Management — MARPOL Annex IV & Annex V; Atmospheric Emissions — MARPOL Annex VI: Sulphur, Incineration, VECS; NOx Technical Code — Tiers I/II/III, SCR, EGR, Miller Cycle; SOLAS 1974, FSS/FTP Codes, Class A/B Divisions & 2024 Inert Gas System Amendments

miw-notes-mgmt-p5.html.title: SOLAS VII–XV & MLC 2006 (Titles 1–4)
miw-notes-mgmt-p5.html.summary: SOLAS Chapter VII — Carriage of Dangerous Goods & Specialized Mandatory Codes; SOLAS Chapters VIII–XI-2 — ISM, HSC, ESP/CSR & ISPS; SOLAS Chapters XII–XV — Bulk Carriers, IMSAS, Polar Code & IP Code; Recent Statutory Amendments (2024–2026) — SOLAS, MARPOL & Hong Kong Convention; MLC 2006 — Legal Architecture and Titles 1 to 4; MLC 2006 Title 5 — Compliance, Certification & Seafarer Abandonment Safeguards

miw-notes-mgmt-p6.html.title: MLC 2006 (Title 5), GBS & Port State Control
miw-notes-mgmt-p6.html.summary: The Maritime Labour Convention (MLC) 2006 — Flag State, Port State & Grievance Infrastructure; IMO Goal-Based Ship Construction Standards (GBS) & The Ship Construction File (SCF); Port State Control (PSC) Regimes, The New Inspection Regime (NIR) & Enforcement Dynamics

miw-notes-mgmt-p7.html.title: Port State Control, Classification Societies & IACS
miw-notes-mgmt-p7.html.summary: Port State Control (PSC) — Compliance, Deficiency Categorization & Detention Appeal Protocols; Classification Societies — Statutory Mandates, In-Service Surveys & Class Status Lifecycle; The IACS Framework — Unified Requirements, Class Transfer & Multi-Class Operations

miw-notes-mgmt-p8.html.title: H-CSR, Class Notations, Noise Code & Liability Regimes (CLC/Fund)
miw-notes-mgmt-p8.html.summary: Harmonized Common Structural Rules (H-CSR) & Goal-Based Standards (GBS); Classification Society Notations & the Code for Recognized Organizations (RO Code); The Code on Noise Levels Onboard Ships (IMO Noise Code); International Maritime Liability Regimes: CLC 1992 & the FUND Convention

miw-notes-mgmt-p9.html.title: IOPC Funds, Bunker Convention, LLMC, Intervention/OPRC & UNCLOS
miw-notes-mgmt-p9.html.summary: IOPC Funds & Voluntary Agreements — STOPIA/TOPIA; Bunker Convention 2001 vs. CLC 92; Convention on Limitation of Liability for Maritime Claims (LLMC); Intervention Convention 1969 & OPRC 1990; UNCLOS Framework & Rights of Passage

miw-notes-mgmt-p10.html.title: Marine Environmental Governance, AFS, Hull Corrosion, FAL & SUA
miw-notes-mgmt-p10.html.summary: Marine Environmental Governance (UNCLOS Pt. XII) & the Tiered Oil Pollution Compensation Regime; The AFS Convention 2001 & Anti-Fouling Coating Technology; Hull Corrosion Dynamics: SACP, ICCP & Marine Growth Prevention; FAL Convention 1965 — the 7 IMO Forms, the Maritime Declaration of Health & Stowaway Management; The SUA Convention (1988/2005) & BMP5 Counter-Piracy Architecture

miw-notes-mgmt-p13.html.summary: III Code/IMSAS deep-dive (nine scope areas, tri-state jurisdiction), ISM Code SMS architecture & non-conformity management, Polar Code ship categories/PWOM/winterization.

miw-notes-mgmt-p14.html.summary: ISPS Code & ship security systems, SSAS engineering/testing, CSC Convention & BLU Code, solid bulk cargo liquefaction & free-surface stability, Flag State administration & MSA 2025/DGMA.

miw-notes-mgmt-p15.html.summary: Ship identification systems (IMO number, MMSI, CSR), maritime liens/mortgages/vessel arrest, statutory seaworthiness & the National Shipping Board, marine casualty investigations & Nairobi Wreck Removal Convention.

miw-notes-mgmt-p16.html.summary: Nairobi Convention/RSV classification/Sagarmala, Loadicator statutory compliance & Integrated Bridge Systems, modernized GMDSS under MSC.496(105), Total Quality Management, theoretical naval architecture (Simpson's Rules/form coefficients), intact & damaged stability (GZ curve/2008 IS Code/SGISC).
